aboutSection.quoteText: Consulting - Designing - Manufacturing - Providing solutions for solid dosage production lines in the pharmaceutical industry.
aboutSection.mainDesc: XYZ Pharmaceutical Machinery Manufacturing Co., Ltd. specializes in consulting, designing, manufacturing automatic machinery and equipment, and providing turnkey solutions for pharmaceutical solid dosage manufacturing plants according to cGMP, GAMP, EU-GMP, PIC/S standards.
aboutSection.subDesc: With the quality policy "German standards - Made in Vietnam", modern and advanced design, strict manufacturing and product testing processes...
